title: ForgeRock Entitlement
description: An entitlement representing a granular access right from an onboarded target application. Entitlements are aggregated into a centralized catalog by Identity Governance for review, certification, and compliance purposes.

applicationName.description: Name of the application that owns this entitlement

owner.description: User identifier of the entitlement owner

glossary.description: Business glossary metadata for the entitlement

requestable.description: Whether users can request this entitlement

approvalRequired.description: Whether approval is required to grant this entitlement

assignedUsers.description: Number of users currently assigned this entitlement
